UnitAbilities.Text: Place two Bomb Squig tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this unit uses this ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pulsa Rokkit
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use its pulsa rokkit. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Lootas unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fixit da Grot
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Throttlerokkit Shokka Engine
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Throttlerokkit Shokka Engine section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

Infos.Title: WAAAGH! WAZDAKKA
Infos.Text: If this model is your Warlord, Warbiker units from your army have the Battleline keyword.

Sections.Title: Turbo Engine:
Sections.Text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Sections.Title: Shokk Attack Engine:
Sections.Text: In your Command phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Sections.Title: Pulse Jet:
Sections.Text:
Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase:
▪ Add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
▪ Models in this unit can move through models and terrain features.

UnitAbilities.Title: Breakin’ Heads
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit’s melee weapons have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

UnitAbilities.Title: Somethin’ to Prove
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit has +1 to charge rolls.

UnitAbilities.Title: Waaagh! Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit has a 5+ invulnerable save. While the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this unit has +1 Toughness.

UnitAbilities.Title: Indiscriminate Detonations
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, when this unit has resolved its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit is suppressed until the start of your next Command phase. While a unit is suppressed, it has -1 to hit rolls.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dakkablitz
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, while making attacks with this unit, if its blitzkannon targeted a non-Monster/Vehicle unit, that weapon has +6 Attacks.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the WAGONS tag and cannot be taken with another WAGONS detachment.
Rule.Title: THUNDERING WAGONS
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Battlewagon/Hunta Rig/Kill Rig units have Wagon.
▪ Friendly Wagon units can re-roll charge rolls.
▪ When a friendly Wagon unit is selected to make an advance move, that unit can change advance rolls to a 6.

Stratagems.Name: Brutal Broadside
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Battlewagon unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Battlewagon unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks (excluding attacks made by weapons selected with Firing Deck) have [RAPID FIRE X], where X is that attack’s A.

Stratagems.Name: Impending Crunch
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Wagon unit ends a charge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Wagon unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Each enemy unit engaged with your unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.

Stratagems.Name: Devastating Drift
Stratagems.When: Your Fight phase, when a friendly Wagon unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Wagon unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have [CLEAVE 1].

Enhancements.Name: Boarding Ramps
Enhancements.Description: Wagon unit only. When a unit embarked within this unit is selected to make a disembark move, that unit has +1 to charge rolls until the end of the turn.

Enhancements.Name: Targetin’ Gizmos
Enhancements.Description:
Wagon unit only. While a Big Mek model is embarked within this unit:
	▪ This unit’s ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].
	▪ If the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this unit’s ranged attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

AddedAbilities.Title: THUNDERING WAGONS
AddedAbilities.Text:
▪ Can re-roll charge rolls.
▪ When selected to make an advance move, that unit can change advance rolls to a 6.

Rule.Title: DAKKA! DAKKA! DAKKA!
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Orks Infantry units’ ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].
▪ In your Shooting phase, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, friendly Orks Infantry units’ ranged attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

Stratagems.Name: Long, Uncontrolled Bursts
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Orks Infantry unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Orks Infantry unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

Stratagems.Name: Speshul Shells
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Orks Infantry unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Orks Infantry unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks that target a unit within 9" have +1 AP.

Stratagems.Name: Call Dat Dakka?
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly Orks Infantry unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: That Orks Infantry unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit shoots using snap shooting, but while doing so your unit can only target that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Dead Shiny Shootas
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have [RAPID FIRE 1]. Or, if that attack already has [RAPID FIRE], +1 to the value of that [RAPID FIRE] (e.g. [RAPID FIRE 1] becomes [RAPID FIRE 2]).

Enhancements.Name: Da Gobshot Thunderbuss
Enhancements.Description:
Orks Infantry model only. This model’s ranged attacks have:
	▪ [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].
	▪ [HAZARDOUS].

AddedAbilities.Title: DAKKA! DAKKA! DAKKA!
AddedAbilities.Text:
▪ Friendly Orks Infantry units’ ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].
	▪ In your Shooting phase, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, friendly Orks Infantry units’ ranged attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

Rule.Title: LISSEN ’ERE
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Stormboyz units have Battleline.
▪ When a friendly Boyz/Kommandos/Stormboyz unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.

Stratagems.Name: Taktikal Retreat
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Kommandos/Stormboyz unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Kommandos/Stormboyz unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: On to da Next
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Boyz/Kommandos/Stormboyz unit that was engaged at the start of the phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Ded Sneaky
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Kommandos/Stormboyz unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Mork’s Kunnin’
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. When both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy up to three friendly Orks Infantry units. When doing so, you can set those units up in strategic reserves, regardless of how many units are already in strategic reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Slippery Git
Enhancements.Description: Infantry Warboss model only (excluding Mega Armour models). This model has Infiltrators and Stealth.

AddedAbilities.Title: LISSEN ’ERE
AddedAbilities.Text: When selected to make an advance/fall-back move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.

AddedAbilities.Title: LISSEN ’ERE
AddedAbilities.Text: When selected to make an advance/fall-back move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.

Rule.Title: GET STUCK IN
Rule.Text: Melee weapons equipped by Orks models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Careen!
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an Orks Vehicle unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: That destroyed Orks Vehicle unit, if you roll a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move over enemy units (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) as if they were not there.

Stratagems.Name: Orks Is Never Beaten
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Unbridled Carnage
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an Orks model in your unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: ’ard As Nails
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army (excluding Grots, Monsters and Vehicle units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Mob Rule
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Mob unit from your army that contains 10 or more models and is not Below Half-strength.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one friendly Battle-shocked Orks Infantry unit within 6" of that Mob unit. That Orks Infantry unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

Stratagems.Name: ’ere We Go
Stratagems.When: Start of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for your unit.

Enhancements.Name: Follow Me Ladz
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

Enhancements.Name: Headwoppa’s Killchoppa
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer that do not have the [EXTRA ATTACKS] ability have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Kunnin’ But Brutal
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Enhancements.Name: Supa-Cybork Body
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Rule.Title: DA HUNT IS ON
Rule.Text:
At the start of your Command phase, select one Monster, Vehicle or Character unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Prey:
▪ When a friendly Beast Snagga unit declares a charge, if your Prey is within 12" of that unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do:
□ That Beast Snagga unit can re-roll that charge roll.
□ That Beast Snagga unit must end that charge move engaged with your Prey.
▪ Each time a Beast Snagga model from your army makes an attack that targets your Prey, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Drag it Down
Stratagems.Category: DA BIG HUNT - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Beast Snagga unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets your Prey, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified  Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

Stratagems.Name: Unstoppable Momentum
Stratagems.Category: DA BIG HUNT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, just after a Beast Snagga Mounted unit from your army ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Beast Snagga unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If that enemy unit is your Prey, roll three additional D6.

Stratagems.Name: Dat One's Even Bigga!
Stratagems.Category: DA BIG HUNT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Beast Snagga unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. In addition, you can re-roll charge rolls made for your unit. If you do, your unit must end that charge move engaged with your Prey.

Stratagems.Name: Where D'Ya Fink You're Going?
Stratagems.Category: DA BIG HUNT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Beast Snagga Infantry or Beast Snagga Mounted unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Stalkin' Taktiks
Stratagems.Category: DA BIG HUNT - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Beast Snagga Infantry or Beast Snagga Mounted unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more fo the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets your until, models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. In addition, if your unit has the Infantry keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability.

Stratagems.Name: Instinctive Hunters
Stratagems.Category: DA BIG HUNT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Beast Snagga unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more  enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Glory Hog
Enhancements.Description: Beastboss on Squigosaur model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Skrag Every Stash!
Enhancements.Description: Beast Snagga model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

Enhancements.Name: Proper Killy
Enhancements.Description: Beast Snagga model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Surly as a Squiggoth
Enhancements.Description: Beastboss on Squigosaur model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is  greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Rule.Title: ADRENALINE JUNKIES
Rule.Text: Speed Freeks units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Speediest Freeks
Stratagems.Category: KULT OF SPEED - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit is a Vehicle unit with an unmodified Toughness characteristic of 8 or less, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save instead.

Stratagems.Name: Squig Flingin
Stratagems.Category: KULT OF SPEED - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Speed Freeks or Trukk unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a BAttle-shock test and, when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

Stratagems.Name: Dakkastorm
Stratagems.Category: KULT OF SPEED - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Speed Freeks unit from Your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. While targeting a unit within 9", they have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Blitza Fire Stratagem in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Blitza Fire
Stratagems.Category: KULT OF SPEED - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Speed Freeks unit from Your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability and, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 9", a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Dakkastorm Strategem in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Full Throttle
Stratagems.Category: KULT OF SPEED - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, just after a Speed Freeks unit from your army ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Speed Freeks unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the  Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: More Gitz Over Ere!
Stratagems.When: Your Opponent’s Movement phase, just  after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Speed Freeks unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Enhancements.Name: Wazblasta
Enhancements.Description: Deffkilla Wartrike model only. In your shooting phase, after the bearer's unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

Enhancements.Name: Fasta Than Yooz
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a Transport after that Transport has made a Normal move, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Enhancements.Name: Squig-Hide Tyres
Enhancements.Description: Deffkilla Wartrike model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

Enhancements.Name: Speed Makes Right
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or a Transport the bearer is embarked within) is within 9" of one or more enemy units, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

Rule.Title: TRY DAT BUTTON!
Rule.Text:
Each time a Mek, Orks Walker or Grots Vehicle unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, roll one D6. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the corresponding ability shown in the table below.

	▪ On [1-2] - Gain [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
	▪ On [3-4] - Gain [LETHAL HITS] ability.
	▪ On [5-6] - Each time an attack is made with this weapon, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2.

Alternatively, when such a unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can select one of the abilities above instead of rolling the D6. If you do, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

If a weapon equipped by a model from you army has the [Hazaroous] ability from multiple sources, each time you take a Hazardous test for that weapon, it is failed on a roll of a l or a 2.

KEYWORDS:
Gretchin units from your army gain the Battleline keyword.

If a weapon equipped by a model from your army has the [HAZARDOUS] ability from multiple sources, each time you take a Hazardous test for that weapon, it is failed on a roll of 1-3.

Stratagems.Name: Klankin Klaws
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks Walker unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit and, if you chose to push it, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons and they have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

Stratagems.Name: Superfuelled Boiler
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Orks Walker unit from your army has been selected to Advance.
Stratagems.Target: That Orks Walker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Bigger Shells for Bigger Gitz
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Mek, Orks Walker or Grots Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle, add 1 to the Wound roll. If you chose to push it, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

Stratagems.Name: Dakka Dakka Dakka
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks Walker or Grots Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If you chose to push it, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

Stratagems.Name: Conniving Runts
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just  after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Gretchin unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6: ona 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move.

Stratagems.Name: Extra Gubbinz
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks Walker or Grots Vehicle unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Smoky Gubbinz
Enhancements.Description: Mek model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

Enhancements.Name: Supa-glowy Fing
Enhancements.Description: Mek model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit with 18" of and visible to the bearer, then roll one D6: on a 1-2, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test; on a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5-6, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Press it Fasta!
Enhancements.Description: Mek model only. Each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, when rolling to determine which ability that unit's weapons gain from the Try Dat Button! Detachment rule, roll one additional D6: until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit gain both Button Effects generated by those rolls. If a duplicate Button Effect is rolled, it has no additional effect.

Enhancements.Name: Gitfinder Googlez
Enhancements.Description: Mek model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Rule.Title: MOB MENTALITY
Rule.Text: Each time an attack targets a Boyz unit from your army, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save against that attack. Each time an attack targets a Boyz unit from your army that contains 10 or more models, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Bulldozer Brutality
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Boyz unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit ts selected to fight, when determinang which models in your unit are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of the unit.

Stratagems.Name: Competitive Streak
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Boyz unit from Your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit contains 10 or more models, re-roll the Wound roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Braggin Rights
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: Two Boyz units from your army that are within 6" of each other.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, while those two units are within 6" of each other, they both count as containing 10 or more models for the purpose of your Detachment rule, any Enhancements models from your army have and any Stratagems you use.

Stratagems.Name: Come on Ladz!
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Boyz unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Return up to D3+2 destroyed models to your unit (excluding Character models).

Stratagems.Name: Tide of Muscle
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Boyz unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, add 1 to the Charge roll and, if your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

Stratagems.Name: Go Get Em!
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Boyz unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

Enhancements.Name: Ferocious Show Off
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry model only. Each time the bearer fights, while resolving those attacks, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearers melee weapons. If the bearer's unit contains 10 or more models, while resolving those attacks, add 3 to the Strength characteristic instead.

Enhancements.Name: Brutal But Kunnin’
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or is embarked within a Transport that is on the battlefield), roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the bearer's unit contains 10 or more models: on a 5+, you gain 1 CP.

Enhancements.Name: Bloodthirsty Belligerence
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit. While that unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit as well.

Enhancements.Name: Raucous Warcaller
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit always counds as containing 10 or more models for the purposes of your Detachment rule and any Stratagems you use.

Rule.Title: DA BOSS IS WATCHIN
Rule.Text: At the start of your Command phase, in a turn in which you have not called a Waaagh!, if you have one or more Warboss models on the battlefield (or embarked within a Transport that is on the battlefield), you can call a Waaagh! for a second time this battle. When doing so, that second Waaagh! only counts as having been called for Warboss, Nobz and Meganobz units from your army.

Stratagems.Name: Armed to Da Teef
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, or the Fight phase
Stratagems.Target: One Nobz or Meganobz unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Too Arrogant to Die
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Nobz or Meganobz unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destoryed, if that model has not shot or fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if a Waaaagh! is active for your unit. On a 5+, do not remove the destroyed mode from play; it can shoot or fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Always Lookin Fer a Fight
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: One Nobz or Meganobz unit from your army that destroyed that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, it can move up to 6" instead.

Stratagems.Name: Crushing Impact
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, just after a Nobz or Meganobz unit from your army ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Nobz or Meganobz unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each mode in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound for each 4+ instead.

Stratagems.Name: Cut Em Down
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
Stratagems.Target: One Nobz or Meganobz unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desprate Escape test. When doing so, if a Waaagh! is active for your unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

Stratagems.Name: Hulking Brutes
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Nobz or Meganobz unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Tellyporta
Enhancements.Description: Warboss IN Mega Armour model only. Models in the bearer’ unit have the Deep Strike ability.

Enhancements.Name: Big Gob
Enhancements.Description: Infantry Warboss model only. At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement range of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, and when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

Enhancements.Name: Da Biggest Boss
Enhancements.Description: Infantry Warboss model only. Add 2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

Enhancements.Name: ’Eadstompa
Enhancements.Description: Infantry Warboss model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

Rule.Title: HERE BE LOOT
Rule.Text:
At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker. Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is your loot objective.
Each time a model in an Orks Infantry, Orks Mounted or Orks Walker unit from your army makes an attack, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if either or both of the following are true:
▪ That model’s unit is within range of your loot objective.
▪ That attack targets a unit within range of your loot objective.

Stratagems.Name: Bash and Grab
Stratagems.When: The Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of the loot objective, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Grab and Bash
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army (excluding Gretchin units) that is within range of the loot objective.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle. Designer’s Note: This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Boardin’ Rush
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Deck Fraggers
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit targets an Infantry unit with a ranged weapon, that weapon has the [BLAST] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Rolling Loot-Heap
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Flash Gitz unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Krump and Run
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit falls back.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that was within engagement range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase and is not within range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Enhancements.Name: Da Kaptin
Enhancements.Description: Warboss model only. Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Orks unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and it is no longer Battle-shocked.

Enhancements.Name: Git-Spotter Squig
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Bionik Workshop
Enhancements.Description:
Big Mek or Painboy model only. At the start of the battle, roll one D3 and compare the result to the list below. Until the end of the battle, models in the bearer’s unit have that bioniks ability.
1. Bionik Legs: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model.
2. Bionik Arms: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.
3. Bionik Bonce: Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Razgit’s Magik Map
Enhancements.Description: Orks model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Orks Infantry units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Rule.Title: TURBO BOOSTAS
Rule.Text:
Each time a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit (excluding Aircraft) from your army Advances, it can use its turbo. If it does, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 24" but can only move in one straight line, and until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by those models have the [ASSAULT] ability and that unit cannot declare a charge.

Designer’s Note: When a unit uses its turbo, the models in that unit cannot pivot, and they cannot make a move of two or more straight lines (e.g. to navigate around obstacles). That unit also cannot declare a charge, even if another rule would let it declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: On Da Move
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back or Advanced (unless it used its turbo this turn).

Stratagems.Name: Mobile Dakkastorm
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, just after a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army has shot.
Stratagems.Target: That Speed Freeks or Trukk unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding attacks made with Indirect Fire weapons). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

Stratagems.Name: Speshul Ammo
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Torrent weapons) have the [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] abilities.

Stratagems.Name: Ded Killy Construction
Stratagems.When: Your Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability and, if your unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons.

Stratagems.Name: Dust Trails
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Benefit of Cover.

Stratagems.Name: Evasive Manoova
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Kustom Shokk Box
Enhancements.Description: Deffkilla Wartrike model only. Each time the bearer uses its turbo, its unit can move horizontally through terrain features.

Enhancements.Name: Dakkamek
Enhancements.Description: Mek model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by the selected Vehicle model have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Supa-Burny Fuel
Enhancements.Description: Deffkilla Wartrike model only. Change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – burna weapon to 3D6, and change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – cutta weapon to 3.

Enhancements.Name: Master Meknologist
Enhancements.Description: Big Mek model only. Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons by 1.

Rule.Title: EAGER FOR THE FIGHT
Rule.Text: Each time an Orks unit from your army disembarks from a Transport, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that Orks unit.

Stratagems.Name: Mount Up, Ladz
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks Infantry unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly Transport it is able to embark within.
Stratagems.Effect: If your Orks Infantry unit is wholly within 6" of that Transport, it can embark within it.

Stratagems.Name: Mekanised Brutality
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a unit disembarks from your unit after your unit makes a Normal move, that disembarked unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Stratagems.Name: Run ’Em Down
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select up to two other friendly Orks Vehicle or Orks Monster units within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit and each unit you selected are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Armoured Duellists
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Orks Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Impervious
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Yooz in Trouble Now
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Battlewagon, Hunta Rig or Kill Rig model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: One Orks Infantry unit embarked within your model can disembark and make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in that unit move a number of inches up to this result, but that unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Runnin’ Boots
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry Character model only. Each time you make a Charge roll for the bearer’s unit, if that unit disembarked from a Transport this turn, add 1 to the result.

Enhancements.Name: Blitzkaptin
Enhancements.Description: Orks Character model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer’s unit (or any Transport it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to three Orks Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Supercharged Squig Oil
Enhancements.Description: Mek model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls for the selected Vehicle model’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Tuff Git
Enhancements.Description: Orks Infantry Character model only. At the end of a phase in which the bearer’s unit disembarked from a Transport, if that unit is Battle-shocked, it is no longer Battle-shocked.

ArmyRules.Title: WAAAGH!
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Orks, once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can call a Waaagh!. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your army and:
▪ Orks units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.
▪ Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by Orks models from your army.
▪ Orks models from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save.
